title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Announcements
text:
# Announcements Filter Past Announcements
To
Filter
Announcements | Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| ORDER U/S 144 Cr. P.C. in connection with the Bye-Electon in 2(two) Assemble Constituencies where the Poll namely 06-Agartala AC & 08-Town Bordowali AC under West Tripura District. | ORDER U/S 144 Cr. P.C. in connection with the Bye-Electon in 2(two) Assemble Constituencies where the Poll namely 06-Agartala AC & 08-Town Bordowali AC under West Tripura District. | 21/06/2022 | 24/06/2022 | |
| ORDER UNDER SECTION 144 Cr.P.C Dated 20/01/2022 | ORDER UNDER SECTION 144 Cr.P.C Dated 20/01/2022 Corona Night Curfew imposed throughtout the West Tripura District from 8 P.M to 5 A.M w.e.f 20/01/2022 to 31/01/2022. | 20/01/2022 | 31/01/2022 | |
| Notification for inviting to join as “Aapda Mitra” Volunteers. | National Disaster Management Authority(NDMA) is going to implement ” Up-scaling of Aapda Mitra ” Scheme as volunteer will be trained for Disaster response under West Tripura District | 07/12/2021 | 30/01/2022 | |
| Order issued u/s. 144 Cr.P.C – withdrawal thereof. | Order issued u/s. 144 Cr.P.C – withdrawal thereof. | 10/01/2022 | 21/01/2022 | |
| Notification of INDIAN AIR FORCE Recruitment. | Notification of INDIAN AIR FORCE Recruitment. For More Details visit www.airmenselection.cdac.in | 02/03/2021 | 15/03/2021 | |
| CORRIGENDUM for recruitment for the post of DPO under DM Office,West Tripura District. | CORRIGENDUM for recruitment for the post of District Programme Officer (DPO) on purely contractual and temporarity basis under DM’s Office,West Tripura which was supposed to close on 12-02-2021 has been extended upto 20-02-2021.
